name: Romy Dulay
summary:
Over 31 years experience as a consulting electrical engineer. Responsible for electrical design
and layout of industrial, schools and commercial buildings, entertainment buildings, schools
and recreational parks, Health Care Facilities, (i.e. airports, prison jobs and TI offices) power,
power distribution system, (NEC/CEC compliance), lighting and lighting controls, (Title-24
compliance), fire/life safety, fire protection system (NFPA 72 and NFPA 99 compliance) and low
voltage systems, Data Centers with UPS/Inverter, Critical Facilities including specifications,
Generator system. Coordination of Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing System Design.
Construction support and coordination, field work/survey and punch list inspection, review
contractor shop drawings and respond to RFI supports etc.

experience.title: Senior Electrical Designer
bullets: Syska Hennesy, Inc, Santa Monica, CA

bullets: Fields Devereaux Architects & Engineer, Los Angeles, California
